panels.description: Medium shot: Elizabeth stands in a luxurious 19th-century drawing room, lighthearted expression, hands gesturing gracefully as she speaks. Soft ambient light from a chandelier.

bubbles.text: I hope I never ridicule what is wise or good. Follies and nonsense do divert me, and I laugh at them whenever I can.

panels.description: Medium close-up shot: Mr. Darcy looks thoughtful, standing tall, elegant attire. Miss Bingley enters the frame from the side, looking at them with a sharp, inquisitive gaze.

bubbles.text: Pride, where there is a real superiority of mind, will be always under good regulation.
Your examination is over, I presume. What is the result?

panels.description: Close-up shot: Elizabeth leaning slightly forward, a playful yet sharp critique in her eyes as she addresses Darcy. Intense, focused lighting.

bubbles.text: That is a failing, indeed! Implacable resentment is a shade in a character. You are safe from me.

panels.description: Wide shot: The whole room. Darcy looks at Elizabeth with a smirk. Miss Bingley in the background, walking towards the piano with an indifferent look, leaving the pair behind.

bubbles.text: And your defect is a propensity to hate everybody.
Do let us have a little music. Louisa, you will not mind my waking Mr. Hurst.
